content.en:
Chapter 3472 Ultimate Heartlight

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian entered the anger channel again and again, gradually suppressing the anger in his heart.

This level is not very difficult.

It can be seen that the thirty-six floors of the ultimate tower are not more difficult than the first, but the requirements for each layer are different, maybe the assessment of the thirty-sixth floor is very simple!

After a long period of time, Ye Tian was already able to completely control his anger, or he would not be disturbed by anger in his emotions and body, and then he came to the tenth layer from the anger channel.

On the tenth floor, there was still no chance reward, and he directly entered the assessment place leading to the eleventh layer, where he encountered the grief passage.

The grief power of the Sorrow Passage would cause the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords to fall into a deep sleep, as if they were going to give up everything and go directly into a deep sleep or commit suicide.

Lin Tian also held on for a while, but he couldn't bear it, and immediately withdrew to ease his emotions.

After that, 613 entered the grief channel again and again, and experienced the grief beyond the extreme again and again, and finally spent countless years before he could finally control his grief.

At this moment, his ultimate will became tenacious again, and some of his flaws were once again made up.

Then, he went to the eleventh layer.

After that, he experienced excitement and greed one after another, and came to the thirteenth floor, and if he wanted to enter the fourteenth layer from the thirteenth floor, he needed to pass through the confusion passage.

And on the side of the confused channel, Ye Tian was really confused.

This level is not dangerous, but it will make people lose their fighting spirit to practice, as if they want to give up their practice completely.

"What is the purpose of the practice?"

"Why do you have to break through to the ultimate supreme?"

"They are all immortal, and the Eternal Realm is invincible, so why do you have to risk attacking the Ultimate Extreme Venerable?"

"(CHDE) What if the impact fails and falls?"

This series of questions made Ye Tian gradually fall into confusion, and he didn't know why he was practicing.

This is the horror of the confused channel, and it will even affect the future, even if you come out of the confused channel, you will still fall into the confusion of all kinds of problems, know that you will completely salted fish, and no longer practice penance.

"It's a terrible and confused passage, which doesn't seem to be dangerous, but it's actually the most dangerous. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Over the years, he has entered the confused passage countless times, but he still can't stick to his heart.

Once again, he entered the confused channel.

Ye Tian was immersed in it and fell into endless confusion.

At this time, neither cultivation nor ultimate will seemed to work.

I don't know when, a little light appeared in the endless confusion, as if it instantly dispelled the endless confusion and allowed Ye Tian to find the way forward.

"What is the future, how to go, it should be up to me to decide, just confused channels, dare to decide my future!"

"Break it for me!"

The little light in Ye Tian's heart instantly broke through this confused passage, allowing him to easily walk to the twelfth floor.

"The efficiency is quite fast, and I have successfully comprehended the ultimate light, and since then all the confusion is no more, the state of mind is the same, and it is eternal. "

Doomsday is extremely respectful.

In fact, it is not easy to achieve this state of mind, when he broke through, he did not reach this level, and only later did he reach it, even if he did not comprehend the ultimate heart light, as long as the ultimate will is strong enough, there is also hope to break through to become the ultimate supreme, but if he masters the ultimate heart light, then the probability of breaking through to become the ultimate supreme will be much greater.

That's why the ultimate tower sets this level.

Of course, even if you really can't comprehend the ultimate heartlight, as long as you comprehend a little special means, there is still hope to pass this level.

Of course, Lin Tian comprehended the ultimate heart light so quickly, and he didn't need to go through the side door.

When Ye Tian came to the twelfth layer, he also passed the Ultimate Seven Tribulations, so that as long as he hit the Ultimate Extreme Venerable in the future, the probability would be extremely high.

......

Twelfth floor.

This turned out to be an Ultimate Heaven and Earth, and it was the Ultimate Extreme Masters who moved a special treasure land in, and here, Lin Tian saw an endless number of special cyan liquid substances.

Ye Tian grabbed it and found that this substance could refine his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body, and he could make the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body continue to improve.

The perfection of the ultimate body is not the limit, there is also an ultimate realm.

Of course, it is certainly not that easy to reach the ultimate realm of the ultimate body, and almost only the ultimate supreme can do it, but it is also excellent to be able to improve the ultimate body.

In addition, Ye Tian also discovered that the true intention of this cyan substance was not to improve the ultimate body, but to repair the hidden wounds of the ultimate body.

Every Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord has had some potential problems in his Ultimate Body after countless years of penance and battles, and this cyan substance can repair the hidden dangers.

Thereupon.

It was here that Ye Tian used this cyan substance to sweep through his entire body, refining it in the deepest depths, and every ultimate particle was repaired, making the entire Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body more perfect.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body no longer had any problems.

"It's time to go to the next floor!"

Ye Tian muttered.
